---
title: "Research Dashboards"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
page-layout: full
---

::: hero
# Research Dashboards

Interactive dashboards built with **Quarto** and **R** to present research findings in a clear, visual, and accessible way.
:::

## Dashboards

::::: dashboard-grid
::: dashboard-card
### [Wh-Exclamatives](./wh_exclamatives_dashboard/index.html)

An interactive dashboard based on my work on the felicity conditions and interpretation of wh-exclamative clauses.
:::

::: dashboard-card
### [Gender Slur Dashboard](./gender_slur_dashboard/index.html)

Experimental investigation of gender-oriented derogation and how interpretation varies with context and speaker properties.
:::

::: {.dashboard-card .dashboard-card-coming}
### More dashboards coming soon

Further dashboards based on published papers and related research projects will be added here over time.
:::
:::::
